ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the country in square miles */,
  "pop_density_per_sq_mi" REAL /* Population density of the country in people per square mile */,
  "coastline_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of coastline length to area */,
  "net_migration" REAL /* Net migration rate */,
  "infant_mortality_per_1000_births" REAL /* Infant mortality rate per 1000 births */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in US dollars */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate as a percentage */,
  "phones_per_1000" REAL /* Number of phones per 1000 people */,
  "arable_land_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for arable purposes */,
  "crop_land_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for crops */,
  "other_land_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for other purposes */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate type of the country */,
  "birth_rate" TEXT /* Birth rate per 1000 people */,
  "death_rate" TEXT /* Death rate per 1000 people */,
  "agriculture_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of agriculture to the economy */,
  "industry_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of industry to the economy */,
  "service_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of service to the economy */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the country in US dollars */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index, a measure of income inequality */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climates ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the region in US dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climates" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate type */,
  "climate_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate type */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the climate type in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average annual precipitation in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, international organization) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new data, correction) */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made during the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic sector record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "agriculture_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of agriculture to the economy */,
  "industry_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of industry to the economy */,
  "service_contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of service to the economy */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_sectors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "infant_mortality_per_1000_births" REAL /* Infant mortality rate per 1000 births */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in years */,
  "healthcare_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Healthcare spending per capita in US dollars */,
  "maternal_mortality_rate" REAL /* Maternal mortality rate per 100,000 live births */,
  "hiv_prevalence" REAL /* HIV prevalence rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate as a percentage */,
  "school_enrollment_rate" REAL /* School enrollment rate as a percentage */,
  "public_education_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Public education spending per capita in US dollars */,
  "higher_education_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Higher education enrollment rate as a percentage */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio in primary education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "phones_per_1000" REAL /* Number of phones per 1000 people */,
  "internet_usage_percentage" REAL /* Internet usage as a percentage of the population */,
  "broadband_subscriptions_per_100" REAL /* Broadband subscriptions per 100 people */,
  "mobile_subscriptions_per_100" REAL /* Mobile subscriptions per 100 people */,
  "internet_speed_mbps" REAL /* Average internet speed in Mbps */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "arable_land_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for arable purposes */,
  "crop_land_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for crops */,
  "other_land_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land used for other purposes */,
  "forest_coverage_percentage" REAL /* Forest coverage as a percentage of total land */,
  "carbon_emissions_per_capita" REAL /* Carbon emissions per capita in metric tons */,
  "water_resources_per_capita" REAL /* Water resources per capita in cubic meters */,
  "air_pollution_index" REAL /* Air pollution index (e.g., PM2.5 concentration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
